subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Friend and awaitest the manifestation of the All-Glorious! Know thou that We have perused the Gospel and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی الخلیل و المنتظر لظهور الجلیل فاعلم انا قرئنا الانجیل و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation, @development of capacity and readiness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture
